violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Observed home canned for items in the coolers. Asparagus, onions, etc--Food item obtained from unapproved source. Observed NOT FOR SALE wild game in a reach in cooler.
Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. Observed steaks in the walk in cooler vacuum sealed.
Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Build up of food in refrigerators and freezers.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Grease build up in kitchen area.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pts deducted)
